verifier_values.criteria: Reports that first most recent change to the Federal Funds Target Rate was an increase of 0.25% +/-0.02.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: This is the first most recent change in the series DFEDTARL in the fred_database table before the identified date.

verifier_values.criteria: Reports that second most recent change to the Federal Funds Target Rate was an increase of 0.25% +/-0.02.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: This is the second most recent change in the series DFEDTARL in the fred_database table before the identified date.

verifier_values.criteria: Reports that the Federal Funds Target Rate at the first most recent change was 5.25% +/-0.05.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: This is the value of the series DFEDTARL in the fred_database table after its most recent change prior to the identified date.

verifier_values.criteria: Reports that the Federal Funds Target Rate at the second most recent change was 5.00% +/-0.05.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: This is the value of the series DFEDTARL in the fred_database table after its second most recent change prior to the identified date.

verifier_values.criteria: Reports that the first most recent change to the Federal Funds target rate was 13 months ago.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: This is the number of days between the identified date and the first most recent change in the series DFEDTARL divided by 30 and rounded.

verifier_values.criteria: Reports that the second most recent change to the Federal Funds target rate was 16 months ago.
verifier_values.criteria_explanation: This is the number of days between the identified date and the second most recent change in the series DFEDTARL divided by 30 and rounded.
